sglang.title: Add float8 dynamic quant to torchao_utils
sglang.author: jerryzh168
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Summary:
Adding float8 dynamic quant with per row and per tensor granularity for benchmarking
Note: this needs torch.compile to show speedup, and torchao needs torch 2.5+ to work with torch.compile, we are waiting for sglang to remove dep on vllm 0.5.5 (which depends on torch 2.4), and allow for dep

sglang.title: [FIX] Catch syntax error of Regex Guide to avoid crash
sglang.author: du00cs
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
Invalid regex will lead to an immediate server exit now.

(please ignore the first error catch)
Modifications
Catch InvalidSyntax error of interegular, and set the regex guide and jump forward to None.

sglang.title: [bugfix]Add modelscope package to avoid docker image without modelscope
sglang.author: KylinMountain
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
When deploy sglang with docker or docker-compose and config env SGLANG_USE_MODELSCOPE=true, it will report No module modelscope found.
Here is the related compose file, you can reproduce it.
services:
  sglang:
    image: lmsysorg/sglang:latest
    container_name: sglang
    volumes:

sglang.title: Fix RuntimeEndpoint.select method
sglang.author: jeffrey-fong
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation


RuntimeEndpoint.select method adds extra preceding token(s) which affects the selection of choices in choices_method. This PR fixes this problem.
When using the language frontend, the tokenizer may result in double BOS if the user uses a chat template that adds BOS token already. This P

How to solve:
ModelScope patches the file_exists and hf_hub_download method
when using VLLM_USE_MODELSCOPE=true, these two methods will use the modelscope to download models.
The error occurs in t

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Fix PP for Multi-Step
vllm.author: varun-sundar-rabindranath
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
The PyObject caches used in multi-step and single-step scheduling were clobbering the objects in the Pipeline-Parallel workflow. However, the effects of the clobbering in single-step scheduling is benign.
Specifically,
SamplingMetadataCache: This clobbers the SequenceGroupToSample object. In Pipelin

vllm.title: [CI/Build] Update models tests & examples
vllm.author: DarkLight1337
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Features:

Added Llama-3.2 correctness (vLLM vs HF) test to Other Models Tests

We can only test this in distributed environment as the model cannot fit in a single L4.


Added a new CI step, Custom Models Tests, which can be customized by model PR authors to run tests for individual models.

This s

vllm.title: [Frontend] Make beam search emulator temperature modifiable
vllm.author: nFunctor
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
A simple PR that addresses #8067 and follows a discussion in #8306 .
The new emulator ends up using a .generate method with specific sampling params. So, it seems that we can simply make the temperature a modifiable parameter.
If i understand correctly, the logprobs returned by .generate follow the

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Support testing prefill throughput with benchmark_serving.py --hf-output-len 1
vllm.author: heheda12345
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
I want to test prefill performance with python3 benchmark_serving.py --hf-output-len 1, but the below code will remove all such requests.
if prompt_len < 4 or output_len < 4:
        # Prune too short sequences.
       continue




 PR Checklist (Click to Expand) 
Thank you for your contribution to

vllm.title: [doc] organize installation doc and expose per-commit docker
vllm.author: youkaichao

vllm.title: [Core] Improve choice of Python multiprocessing method
vllm.author: russellb
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR improves the choice of Python multiprocessing method in the following
ways:


Detect if CUDA has already been initialized and force the use of spawn in
that case. We know it will fail otherwise. There are similar changes in the
tree that force the use of spawn for other accelerator types.

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Block manager v2 with preemption and lookahead slots
vllm.author: sroy745
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
In this pr we address an issue with the logic in BlockManager V2 when computing whether a sequence group can be swapped in.
In the current implementation we don't consider the unseen tokens when deciding whether a sequence group can be swapped in or not. Later when we try to allocate blocks for the

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Fix Marlin MoE act order when is_k_full == False
vllm.author: ElizaWszola
vllm.bodyExcerpt: Fix the broken incrementation of scales tensor in the code that runs the kernel.

vllm.title: [CI/Build] Add test decorator for minimum GPU memory
vllm.author: DarkLight1337
vllm.bodyExcerpt: I found that get_gpu_memory inside test_phimoe.py initializes CUDA at import time, so this PR updates it to avoid initializing CUDA. Since there are also other tests that are skipped because of OOM issues, I've factored all of this out into a separate function.

vllm.title: [Build/CI] Set FETCHCONTENT_BASE_DIR to one location for better caching
vllm.author: tlrmchlsmth
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
We use CMake's FetchContent for managing dependencies that are compiled as part of vLLM's build process, e.g. CUTLASS, and vllm-flash-attn. FetchContent will by default place dependencies at CMAKE_BINARY_DIR/_deps. See documentation here.
When building vllm with python setup.py build_ext --inplace,

vllm.title: [Model] Support Qwen2.5-Math-RM-72B
vllm.author: zhuzilin
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
FILL IN THE PR DESCRIPTION HERE
Support Qwen2.5-Math-RM-72B as embedding model.
The model can be served with:
python -m vllm.entrypoints.openai.api_server \
	--model Qwen/Qwen2.5-Math-RM-72B \
	--trust-remote-code \
	--served-model-name Qwen2.5-Math-RM-72B \
	--port 8080 \
	--tensor-parallel-size 8
